headline: F-35 Software Upgrades ‘Stagnated’ as Jets Fly Iran Missions
summary: The most recent upgrade, called TR-3, which will be fielded eventually on jets like those flying Iran missions, “was predominately unusable” during most of last year “due to stability problems, shortfalls in capability and ongoing discovery of deficiencies,” according to the report made available to Bloomberg News.  It was referring to a software version that hadn’t fully been tested.

It was referring to a software version that hadn’t fully been tested.

headline: SpaceX, Boeing, and Lockheed Will Take America Back to the Moon -- but Not Just Yet
summary: NASA has a new leader, who has a realistic plan to send astronauts to the moon at an affordable price.

headline: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
summary: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.
